Results.COMPONENT: Glucose measurements in range/Total glucose measurements
Results.DefinitionDescription: The percentage of blood glucose levels that are in a target range for patients using continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) devices. The International Consensus in Time in Range (IC-TIR) defines the target range between 70 and 180 mg/dL (3.9-10.0 mmol/L).[PMID: 31177185] The goal is to reduce the time spent in hypoglycemia (glucose levels < 70 mg/dL).
Results.SURVEY_QUEST_TEXT: Amount of time, in percent, as measured by CGM (continuous glucose monitor) device, spent in target glucose range (70-180 mg/dL [3.9-10.0 mmol/L]) during reporting period. The primary goal for effective and safe glucose control is to increase the TIR whil
